ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "game_season" TEXT /* Season of the game */,
  "game_quarter" INTEGER /* Current quarter of the game */,
  "game_time_remaining" TEXT /* Remaining time in the current quarter */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the venue */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "player_contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "player_salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue in number of seats */,
  "venue_opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "venue_owner" TEXT /* Name of the venue's owner or management company */,
  "venue_surface" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., hardwood, synthetic) */,
  "venue_roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., dome, open-air) */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* URL to the venue's official website */,
  "venue_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the venue's social media accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event (in minutes and seconds) */,
  "away_description" TEXT /* Description of the event for the away team */,
  "home_description" TEXT /* Description of the event for the home team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game at the time of the event */,
  "away_change" TEXT /* Change in score for the away team */,
  "home_change" TEXT /* Change in score for the home team */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_period" TEXT /* Period of the game */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the event belongs to */,
  "event_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_location_x" TEXT /* X-coordinate of the event location on the court */,
  "event_location_y" TEXT /* Y-coordinate of the event location on the court */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (if applicable, e.g., for timeouts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., jump shot, three-pointer, turnover) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "event_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player action */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the action belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player performing the action */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the action was successful (e.g., shot made) */,
  "assisted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the player assisting the action (if applicable) */,
  "action_outcome" TEXT /* Detailed outcome of the action */,
  "action_location_x" TEXT /* X-coordinate of the action location on the court */,
  "action_location_y" TEXT /* Y-coordinate of the action location on the court */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time in seconds when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebound_types" (
  "rebound_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebound type */,
  "rebound_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rebound type (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rebound type */,
  "rebound_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the rebound type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebound_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebounds" (
  "rebound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebound */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the rebound belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who secured the rebound */,
  "rebound_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rebound type */,
  "rebound_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that secured the rebound */,
  "rebound_location_x" TEXT /* X-coordinate of the rebound location on the court */,
  "rebound_location_y" TEXT /* Y-coordinate of the rebound location on the court */,
  "rebound_time" TEXT /* Time in seconds when the rebound occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_rebound_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rebound_type_id") REFERENCES rebound_types ("rebound_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_rebound_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("rebound_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the turnover belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the turnover */,
  "turnover_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnover type */,
  "steal_by" INTEGER /* ID of the player who stole the ball (if applicable) */,
  "turnover_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that committed the turnover */,
  "turnover_location_x" TEXT /* X-coordinate of the turnover location on the court */,
  "turnover_location_y" TEXT /* Y-coordinate of the turnover location on the court */,
  "turnover_time" TEXT /* Time in seconds when the turnover occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_turnover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("turnover_type_id") REFERENCES turnover_types ("turnover_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_turnover_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("turnover_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_types" (
  "turnover_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover type */,
  "turnover_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the turnover type (e.g., lost ball, travel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the turnover type */,
  "turnover_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the turnover type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, staff) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password for the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
